# Same contract in a different order, plus a permitted new export.
OBJECT|orbit_api_level|ORBIT_2.0|default|-
FUNC|orbit_session_open|ORBIT_2.0|default|-
FUNC|orbit_session_open_v1|ORBIT_1.0|compat|orbit_session_open
FUNC|orbit_session_close|ORBIT_2.0|default|-
FUNC|orbit_session_open|ORBIT_1.0|compat|-
FUNC|orbit_session_flush|ORBIT_2.1|default|-
